summary: Bug fix verification complete for auto-mixer subscription expiry handling. 10/10 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (AutoMixerSubscription, GameLabRedesign, main page) load without console errors. Key fixes verified: datetime comparison using parse_utc_datetime(), expiring_soon/days_remaining fields in subscription endpoint, expired subscription filtering in trigger-now and processor loop.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ parse_utc_datetime() helper properly handles naive/aware datetime conversion from MongoDB
✓ get_auto_mixer_subscription now returns expiring_soon (bool) and days_remaining (int) for active subscriptions
✓ get_auto_mixer_agent_status uses parse_utc_datetime for subscription_end filtering and mixes_last_hour calculation
✓ trigger_auto_mixer_now filters expired subscriptions before processing and bulk-expires detected ones
✓ auto_mixer_processor_loop fetches ALL active subs and filters with parse_utc_datetime(), bulk-expires expired subs
✓ Frontend AutoMixerSubscription.jsx includes Bell icon import and expiry warning bar with Renew Now button
✓ Frontend GameLabRedesign.jsx fetches subscription during init, shows amber warning banner with Renew/Dismiss buttons
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auto_mixer_subscription_expiry.py (NEW - 10 test cases for expiry fix validation)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 pages load without console errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-mixer subscription expiry handling verified working. Key datetime fix: all subscription_end comparisons go through parse_utc_datetime() to handle naive/aware datetime mismatches from MongoDB. Frontend notification bars have data-testid attributes for testing: subscription-expiry-warning (AutoMixer), gamelab-subscription-expiry-warning (GameLab). Subscription endpoint now returns expiring_soon and days_remaining fields for active subscriptions within 5 days of expiry.

datetime_comparison_fix.description: parse_utc_datetime() handles naive/aware datetime conversion from MongoDB

expiring_soon_notification.description: Subscription endpoint returns expiring_soon and days_remaining for subs expiring within 5 days
frontend_implementation: AutoMixerSubscription.jsx - Bell icon warning bar after success messages
GameLabRedesign.jsx - Amber warning banner with Renew/Dismiss buttons

expired_subscription_filtering.auto_expire: Detected expired subs are bulk-updated to status='expired'
